title: First Ride
description: Complete your first attraction of the trip.

title: Coaster Enthusiast
description: Ride 5 different coasters.

title: Thrill Seeker
description: Ride 3 attractions with a thrill level of 4 or higher.

title: Mine Train Master
description: Ride Seven Dwarfs Mine Train 3 times in one trip.

title: Lightning Fast
description: Use Lightning Lane 5 times.

title: Early Bird
description: Arrive at the park before rope drop.

title: Rope Drop Royalty
description: Complete 3 attractions before 10am.

title: Taste of Magic
description: Complete your first table-service meal.

title: Snack Connoisseur
description: Try 5 different park snacks.

title: Character Greeter
description: Meet your first Disney character.

title: Princess Court
description: Meet 3 Disney princesses.

title: Explorer
description: Visit every land in a single park.

title: Photo Collector
description: Capture 10 PhotoPass moments.

title: Marathon Walker
description: Walk 15,000 steps in a single day.

title: Full Day Hero
description: Stay in the park for a full 12 hours.

title: Family Team
description: Complete a full day together as a family.

title: Hydration Hero
description: Log 5 hydration breaks in a single day.

title: Resistance Recruit
description: Ride Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance.

title: Smugglers Elite
description: Pilot the Millennium Falcon in Smugglers Run.

title: Perfect Day
description: Complete every planned attraction with zero skips.
celebrationMessage: A flawless day at the parks — Mission Accomplished!
